ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* The team or club the athlete represents */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the coach */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the discipline */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level required for the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event took place */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organization hosting the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the athlete */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score of the athlete */,
  "presentation_score" REAL /* Presentation component score of the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Final placing of the athlete */,
  "segments" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed segment scores */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the judges or officials */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video of the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the athlete
Reference to the coach of the athlete
The team or club the athlete represents
Date of birth of the coach
Skill level required for the discipline
Reference to the discipline of the event
